context: Agent must author a complete README.md for a CLI tool named snapcheck following specific structural and formatting requirements.

checklist.name: document_structure_order
checklist.description: README contains H2 sections for Overview, Installation, Usage, Commands, Configuration, and Contributing, in that order.

checklist.name: heading_levels_sequential
checklist.description: No heading level jumps. Every H3 appears under an H2 parent, no H4 without H3 parent.

checklist.name: code_blocks_language_tags
checklist.description: Every fenced code block has a language tag. Shell commands use bash, config examples use yaml or json.

checklist.name: list_markers_consistent
checklist.description: All bullet list items use the same marker style. No mixing of -, *, and + across lists.

checklist.name: commands_table
checklist.description: Commands section contains a Markdown table with columns for command name, syntax, and description. Properly formatted with aligned pipes.
